name: Pinchflat
description: Pinchflat is a self-hosted YouTube media manager built with yt-dlp for automatically downloading and organizing content from channels and playlists.

notes.text: For large media libraries, use an external mount path such as `/mnt/pinchflat` for downloads.
Pinchflat data is stored in `/opt/pinchflat/config`; downloaded media is stored in the selected downloads path.
